question: Return the name of the high school student with the most friends.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.text_1 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.pk_1 GROUP BY T1.pk_1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.text_1 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.pk_1 GROUP BY T1.pk_1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
